title: Device(headset) is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Headset registration to Poly Lens Cloud is verified after pairing via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens app menu.
4. Check the Lens server inventory for the current device list.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Pair a new headset with the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Return to the Poly Lens app.
8. Refresh the Lens Cloud inventory page.
9. Verify the newly paired headset appears in the device list.
expected: The newly paired headset appears in the Lens Cloud inventory device list.
